summary: Completed backend and frontend testing of MercoTêxtil system - Banco de Dados CRUD, Ordem de Produção autocomplete, delete button for pending orders, and machine queue ordering features.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed artigos during backend testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Banco de Dados CRUD for artigos, 2) Autocomplete in Ordem de Produção that fills engrenagem/fios/maquinas, 3) Delete button visible only for pending ordens, 4) Machine queue ordering by newest first. Backend runs on port 8001 with FastAPI, Frontend on port 3000 with React.

features_tested.banco_dados_criar_artigo: PASSED - POST /api/banco-dados creates artigo with all fields
features_tested.ordem_producao_criar_com_campos_extras: PASSED - POST /api/ordens-producao creates ordem with engrenagem, fios, maquinas
features_tested.ordem_producao_autocomplete_ui: PASSED - Typing in artigo field shows suggestions from banco de dados
features_tested.ordem_producao_preencher_automatico: PASSED - Selecting suggestion fills engrenagem, fios, maquinas fields
features_tested.ordem_producao_botao_excluir_pendente: PASSED - Delete button visible only on orders with 'Pendente' status
features_tested.fila_maquinas_ordenacao_novos: PASSED - GET /api/machines/{code}/orders returns orders sorted by created_at descending
